status.description: Status is the CI result status.

provider.description: Provider is the CI provider name when one is available.

url.description: URL is the CI run URL when one is available.

reason.description: Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record.

EvidenceCIInput.description: EvidenceCIInput is the JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind ci`.

title: CI evidence input
description: JSON input consumed by `harness evidence submit --kind ci`.
